description: Binary A+B=C ground-truth rows derived from the measured HYPERDOC 2025 manuscript mock-up dataset.

resampling.note: The VNIR reflectance is integrated on its native wavelength grid after converting the runtime 10 nm D65-weighted color-matching sample weights into per-nanometre densities and interpolating those onto the measured grid.

colorConversion.implementation: D65-weighted runtime CMFs from packages/js/src/spectral-basis-data.js, integrated on the measured VNIR wavelength grid and converted with XYZ_TO_SRGB_D65.
colorConversion.note: Only VNIR spectra are used for color conversion. SWIR is retained in the raw dataset for provenance and future research, but it is not stitched into the visible-range color target.
